name: directdraw_enumerate_import_provider
description: DirectDrawEnumerateA is provided by the DirectDraw import/runtime provider and is not authored production source.
known_limits: DirectDrawEnumerateA is an external DirectDraw provider import; there is no authored function body to compare with VC COFF object bytes.
Final binary safety for this entry depends on PE import/provider verification rather than per-function source codegen.
The native smoke verifies that ddraw.dll exports DirectDrawEnumerateA on the host used for DirectDraw provider-backed smoke tests.
